title: Norm
description: Governance DNA archetype for Norm — measurable constraint predicates (DNA 'N'). Standalone first-class GSM class typed by NormArchetype. Fields: directiveId, structureId, guard, predicate, toleranceMode, temporalWindow, temporalAggregation, sustainedThreshold.

directiveId.description: Reference to the Directive this Norm operationalizes (Directive's elementId). Every Norm operationalizes exactly one Directive.

structureId.description: The authoring/owning Structure's elementId (definedBy relationship). May differ from the Directive's owning Structure.

guard.description: CEL expression — activation condition. Predicate is only evaluated when guard is true.

predicate.description: CEL expression returning boolean. The constraint. References exactly one Archetype by name as root identifier, then navigates its JSON fields. Example: SecurityProperties.encryptionLevel >= 'AES-128'.

toleranceMode.description: How violations are measured over time.

temporalWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration for time-based tolerance modes. Required when toleranceMode is time-based (AGGREGATED, SUSTAINED).

temporalAggregation.description: Aggregation function applied to values within the temporalWindow.

sustainedThreshold.description: Ratio [0,1] — fraction of temporalWindow the predicate must hold. Required when toleranceMode = SUSTAINED.
